stance.prompt: side view, full body, young wuxia swordsman in deep blue robes, combat guard stance, sword DRAWN and held ready in front, empty scabbard visible at his hip, exaggerated confident wide stance, comical wild energy, clean white background
stance.notes: user pick over wider-stance candidates; generated via sprite-extractor extract --backend codex because rawgen is not exposed in current aiexp CLI

coil.prompt: Edit the image: the sheath at his hip is an empty scabbard -- remove the sword handle and pommel sticking out of it so it is just an empty green sheath. He keeps facing the same direction; keep the same coiled windup pose, same face, hair, blue robes, white pants, black boots, drawn sword in hand, jade tassel, clean green background. Everything else stays unchanged.
coil.notes: user approved coil cand_2 after empty-scabbard correction; source pose from /tmp/wu-reanim/keyframes/light/coil/cand_2.png

thrust.prompt: Edit the image: the sheath at his hip is an empty scabbard -- remove the sword handle and pommel sticking out of it so it is just an empty green sheath. He keeps facing the same direction; keep the same forward thrust pose, same face, hair, blue robes, white pants, black boots, drawn sword fully extended in hand, jade tassel, clean green background. Everything else stays unchanged.
thrust.notes: user approved thrust cand_2 after empty-scabbard correction; source pose from /tmp/wu-reanim/keyframes/light/thrust/cand_2.png

windup.prompt: Edit the image: the young wuxia swordsman performs a massive heavy-attack windup, sword raised far overhead and behind him, torso twisted back, knees bent in a wide rooted stance, comically telegraphed power, face focused, sword DRAWN in both hands, empty green scabbard visible at his hip with no handle or pommel sticking out, same blue robes, white pants, black boots, jade tassel, side view, full body, clean green background. Everything else stays consistent.
windup.notes: user approved heavy windup cand_2; overhead cleave concept selected for Phase 4

strike.prompt: Edit the image: continue this exact heavy windup into the impact frame of a huge diagonal sword cleave. The swordsman has just swung downward and forward from overhead; blade cuts across the front on a broad diagonal slash, not a straight thrust. Body weight dropped low, torso committed forward, stance grounded and powerful, sword DRAWN in both hands, empty green scabbard still visible at his hip with no handle or pommel sticking out, same face, hair, blue robes, white pants, black boots, jade tassel, side view, full body, clean green background. Everything else stays consistent.
strike.notes: user approved heavy strike cand_4; selected over thrust-like cand_2/cand_3 to keep heavy distinct from light

recover.prompt: Edit the image: continue this exact heavy cleave into the recovery follow-through. The swordsman has just completed the downward diagonal slash and is settling low, blade lowered across the front, same two-hand grip orientation as this image, hands still on the sword in the same relationship, body weight grounded, shoulders dropping after impact, no second attack, empty green scabbard still visible at his hip with no handle or pommel sticking out, same face, hair, blue robes, white pants, black boots, jade tassel, side view, full body, clean green background. Everything else stays consistent.
recover.notes: user approved recover cand_2; image-to-image from approved heavy strike cand_4 to preserve grip and swing path

hit.prompt: Edit the image: Hu is hit by a huge impact and is violently knocked backward in a wild comical fighting-game recoil. Push the exaggeration hard: whole torso whipped backward, head snapped back, mouth grimacing, arms flailing open, sword still UNSHEATHED but thrown off-line in his hand, knees buckling, feet nearly leaving the ground, body off-balance and clearly losing control. Full body side view on clean chroma green. Same young wuxia swordsman, face, hair bun, blue robe, white pants, black boots, jade tassel. Green hip scabbard is empty with no handle or pommel sticking out. No duplicate sword, no composed guard stance.
hit.notes: Phase 5 Gate 1 approved hit cand_2; selected over cand_1 because the recoil is less composed, over cand_3 because the sword drops, and over cand_4 by user preference.

block.prompt: Edit the image: Hu is blocking a heavy blow with a low braced cross-body parry. Make the pose visually distinct from his guard: body compressed, weight back, front knee bent, sword laid almost flat across the body at rib height, blade spanning left-to-right as a barrier, shoulders behind the sword. Full body side view on clean chroma green. Same face, hair bun, deep blue robe, white pants, black boots, drawn sword with jade tassel, empty green hip scabbard with no handle or pommel. No forward attack pose, no duplicate sword.
block.notes: Phase 5 Gate 1 approved block cand_3; selected because it is a distinct low braced cross-body parry. cand_1 was too guard-like and cand_4 regressed toward ready stance.

stun_a.prompt: Edit the image: the young wuxia swordsman is stunned and dazed in a comical wobbling pose. Eyes spiraling or unfocused, head tilted, shoulders loose, knees wobbly, sword drooping but still in hand, full body side view. Drawn sword with jade tassel, empty green scabbard at his hip with no handle or pommel sticking out. Same face, hair bun, blue robe, white pants, black boots. Clean chroma green background. Everything else stays consistent.
stun_a.notes: Phase 5 Gate 1 approved stun_a cand_1; baked dazed/stars read accepted for the held stunned ping-pong pair.

stun_b.prompt: Edit the image: create a second slight variant of the stunned dazed pose. The young wuxia swordsman wobbles the opposite way, head tilted differently, eyes spiraling or unfocused, knees loose, sword drooping but still in hand, full body side view. Drawn sword with jade tassel, empty green scabbard at his hip with no handle or pommel sticking out. Same face, hair bun, blue robe, white pants, black boots. Clean chroma green background. Everything else stays consistent.
stun_b.notes: Phase 5 Gate 1 approved stun_b cand_1 as the second held stunned ping-pong pose.

dash.prompt: Edit the image: render Hu in a low fast dash pose on clean chroma green. Keep the forward-leaning running silhouette: body low and stretched forward, one knee lifted, trailing leg driving back. The sword is UNSHEATHED and clearly drawn in his rear hand, blade visible trailing behind him; the green hip scabbard is empty with no handle or pommel sticking out. Do not put the sword back in the scabbard. No duplicate sword. Full body side view, same face, hair bun, blue robe, white pants, black boots, jade tassel on the sword.
dash.notes: Phase 5 Gate 1 approved dash cand_3; cand_1 was a guard/block fallback and cand_2 sheathed the sword.

rise.prompt: Edit the image: the young wuxia swordsman is launching upward into a jump. Knees lifting, body rising off the ground, sword held ready, robe and scabbard following upward motion, full body side view. Drawn sword with jade tassel, empty green scabbard at his hip with no handle or pommel sticking out. Same face, hair bun, blue robe, white pants, black boots. Clean chroma green background. Everything else stays consistent.

peak.prompt: Edit the image: the young wuxia swordsman is airborne at the peak of a jump. Body suspended, legs spread or tucked naturally for a fighting game jump, sword balanced and ready, robe floating, full body side view. Drawn sword with jade tassel, empty green scabbard at his hip with no handle or pommel sticking out. Same face, hair bun, blue robe, white pants, black boots. Clean chroma green background. Everything else stays consistent.

fall.prompt: Edit the image: turn this airborne Hu pose into the falling-down phase after a jump. Keep him clearly in the air, body angled downward and forward, knees and boots preparing for landing, robe and empty scabbard pulled upward by descent. Sword remains UNSHEATHED and clearly visible in one hand with jade tassel; green hip scabbard is empty with no handle or pommel sticking out. Full body side view, same face, hair bun, blue robe, white pants, black boots. Clean chroma green background. No duplicate sword, no standing guard pose.
fall.notes: Phase 5 Gate 1 approved fall cand_2; cand_1 was a guard/block fallback.

land.prompt: Edit the image: turn this into Hu landing from a jump in a deep compressed crouch. He has just hit the ground: knees bent much lower than the reference, weight sunk down, torso forward, sword still UNSHEATHED and ready near the front, face focused. Full body side view on clean chroma green. Green hip scabbard is empty with no handle or pommel sticking out. Same face, hair bun, blue robe, white pants, black boots, jade tassel. No duplicate sword, no standing guard pose.
land.notes: Phase 5 Gate 1 approved land cand_2; cand_1 was a guard/block fallback.
